title: Faithful and Compat 64x
description: Faithful consistency textures for some mods
body:
low effort textures to make the following mods consistent with 64x faithful
rotten creatures (no mobs)
waystones
mystical oak tree
relics 
bosses of mass destruction 
simplest copper gear
improvable skills
MmmMmmMmm

credit faithful creators who's assets have been used as reference and bases for this pack, the credits.txt is included in the zip file, several block textures have been used in the creation of this pack
